title: 1.19 Panorama with Shaders [Night]
description: Great looking Resource Pack that adds Shaders to the 1.19 Panorama. | All Versions Supported
body:
# 1.19 Panorama with Shaders [Night]
This is a really simple Resource Pack that adds shaders to the original panorama. The seed was discovered by the [Minecraft@Home](https://www.youtube.com/@MinecraftAtHome) team. ➼ Seed: -1696067516 ➼ Text Seed: thewildupdate ➼ Coordinates: X=3820.872 Y=67.868 Z=553.455 ➼ Version: Minecraft Java Snapshot 22w15a The shaders used are the [Complementary Reimagined](https://www.complementary.dev/reimagined/) Shaders.
Show other Panoramas with Shaders [![PWS Collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YMkHXwcC/images/9b9fd605a5f79e388c8be117c7adfa93805f35b0.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/CJAr4HQN) Click the image^
___ ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JVczRBrp/images/4cbaada3c5a0bee829c66437d34f9547d889ca62.png) ___ Follow my socials! ➽[Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/itsmemed_552) ➽[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/itsmemed_554/) ➽[Twitter](https://twitter.com/itsmemed_554) ➽[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@itsmemed_552) ___ [![](https://i.creativecommons.org/l/by-nc-sa/4.0/88x31.png)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) This work is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). - Feel free to include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - If you wish to use this pack in any form of content, please credit with a link to the original PlanetMinecraft/Modrinth/CurseForge page where you can.
